description: Registry of all schemas in the HELEN OS / CONQUEST LAND architecture. Each schema is hash-pinned for tamper detection.

evidence_bundle_v1.schema.json.description: CONQUEST LAND output: simulation snapshot with houses, metrics, task records

issue_list_v1.schema.json.description: HELEN audit output: issues found during review

task_list_v1.schema.json.description: HELEN planning output: proposed tasks with priorities

gate_report_v1.schema.json.description: Gate evaluation results: which gates passed/failed

mayor_packet_v1.schema.json.description: HELEN submission to MAYOR: bundles all Tier A artifacts with routing receipts

gate_evaluated_v1.schema.json.description: MAYOR's final verdict: may result in ledger mutation

validation_rules.tier_a_to_tier_b: Tier A artifacts flow into Tier B via MayorPacket only
validation_rules.hash_pinning: If any schema is modified, its hash changes and must be updated here
validation_rules.dialect_enforcement: All schemas MUST use JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 ($schema field)
